description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wood cabinet with a flat top surface and three front-facing doors, each equipped with a small metallic handle. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a classic, sturdy appearance suitable for urban interiors such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas. The front panel is divided into three sections, each outlined with subtle trim, suggesting separate storage compartments behind each door. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative features. The cabinet sits directly on the ground with a slightly recessed base, providing stability. Its overall design is functional and robust, prioritizing storage and durability over ornate detailing.
description: A dark wood, three-door cabinet with metallic handles and a flat top, featuring a classic, sturdy design and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat wooden panel with visible grain and no handles or openings.
description_view_1: The front of the cabinet, displaying three doors with metallic handles and subtle trim outlining each compartment.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, identical to the left, with a plain wooden panel and no visible features.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, featuring a single, unadorned wooden panel with no handles, doors, or trim.
